title: Datadog Revenue 2018-2026
text: Datadog Historical Revenue Trends 2018-2026. Revenue Growth Trajectory: Datadog has demonstrated consistent revenue growth since its IPO in September 2019 with revenues accelerating from initial levels to current run rates. Historical Performance: The company's revenue has grown from approximately 153 million in H1 2019 at IPO time to 2.13 billion in FY 2023 and 1.01 billion in Q1 2026 alone. Growth Drivers: Revenue growth has been driven by cloud migration trends digital transformation adoption and more recently AI infrastructure demand. Market Opportunity: The cloud monitoring and observability market has expanded significantly creating substantial opportunities for Datadog. Customer Expansion: The company has grown from approximately 1,000 customers at IPO to over 33,000 customers by Q1 2026. Product Diversification: Datadog expanded beyond infrastructure monitoring into log management APM security and other observability solutions. Margin Improvement: The company has improved profitability from losses in early years to positive net income and strong operating margins. Future Outlook: Analysts project continued revenue growth of 25-27 percent in 2026 driven by AI demand and cloud adoption.
